# Global Infectious Diseases: Interactive Infographic Hub

> An educational, single-page static site visualizing the global burden of infectious diseases and prevention. Built by Jonathan Au.

## What This Site Contains

- Global disease burden rankings using GBD 2023 DALYs
- Profiles of 10 major infectious diseases: COVID-19, lower respiratory infections, diarrhoeal diseases, HIV/AIDS, malaria, tuberculosis, hepatitis B and C, influenza, dengue, and norovirus
- Side-by-side comparison table of pathogen type, transmission, deaths, and vaccine status
- Co-infection interaction summaries (HIV + TB, flu + bacterial pneumonia, dengue serotype shift, etc.)
- Transmission route explanations (airborne, fecal-oral, vector-borne, bloodborne)
- Disease amplification in enclosed environments
- Evidence-based universal prevention strategies
- Myths vs. facts section
- Seasonal disease patterns by region

## Key Statistics (GBD 2023 / WHO / CDC)

- Lower Respiratory Infections: 98.7 million DALYs (2023), 2.50 million deaths
- Diarrhoeal Diseases: 56.5 million DALYs (2023)
- Malaria: 51.6 million DALYs (2023), 610,000 deaths (2024), 282 million cases (2024)
- HIV/AIDS: 45.1 million DALYs (2023), 630,000 deaths (2024), 40.8 million living with HIV
- Tuberculosis: 43.6 million DALYs (2023), 10.7 million cases (2024), 1.23 million deaths (2024)
- Norovirus: 685 million cases/year, ~200,000 deaths/year globally
- Dengue: 14.6 million reported cases (2024), >12,000 reported deaths (2024)
- Influenza: ~1 billion estimated cases/year, 290,000-650,000 respiratory deaths/year
- CMNN DALYs total (GBD 2023): 681 million

## Data Sources

- Global Burden of Disease Study 2023 (IHME / The Lancet): https://doi.org/10.1016/S0140-6736(25)01637-X
- WHO Global TB Report 2025: https://www.who.int/publications/i/item/9789240116924
- WHO Global Hepatitis Report 2026: https://www.who.int/teams/global-hiv-hepatitis-and-stis-programmes/hepatitis/reports/global-hepatitis-report-2026
- UNAIDS Global AIDS Update 2025: https://www.unaids.org/en/UNAIDS-global-AIDS-update-2025
- WHO Malaria data: https://www.who.int/data/gho/data/themes/malaria/GHO/malaria
- WHO Dengue fact sheet: https://www.who.int/en/news-room/fact-sheets/detail/dengue-and-severe-dengue
- CDC Norovirus: https://www.cdc.gov/norovirus/
- CDC Vessel Sanitation Program: https://www.cdc.gov/vessel-sanitation/
